历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plans
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum rankings for Physics Category were approximately 28818 → 30033 → 33456 → 44969 → 50224, showing a continuous backward trend, with a cumulative backward shift of about 16800 in the last 3 years, and a 2025 baseline of about 50224; the university's enrollment plan in Hebei Province for Physics Category was 81 from 2021 to 2023, increased to 85 in 2024, significantly increased to 106 in 2025, and further expanded to 126 in 2026, an increase of about 18.9% compared to 2025, with two consecutive years of significant expansion, easing competitive pressure.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: 211 Project, Double First-Class construction university; the main ranking of Soft Science has steadily risen from 94th in 2021 to 86th in 2026, with a steady improvement in recent years and recognition of comprehensive strength; no negative public opinion related to Guangxi University appeared in the 2026 reputation documents; Douyin popularity ranking 25th (relatively hot), with a comprehensive popularity of about 1.83 million, high attention on short video platforms, events such as Yanghuaju's return runway show increased campus exposure; no records of admission cut-off gaps; Guangxi University.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Computer Science, Electrical Engineering and Automation, Electronic Information/Communication and other majors continue to be highly recommended, highly overlapping with the university's Physics Category enrollment majors, with strong appeal of popular engineering majors; Hebei Province in 2026 has about 365,000 Physics Category candidates, a slight increase from 363,000 in 2025, with slightly intensified competition; Guangxi University is located in Nanning, Guangxi, far from Hebei, with some regional preference loss for cross-province applications; the university's enrollment plan in Hebei Province accounts for a small proportion, which is a normal scale for cross-province enrollment.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the continuous backward trend of historical rankings, the continued significant expansion of the 2026 plan (+18.9%), the steady rise in university ranking, and high Douyin popularity, along with a slight increase in candidate numbers and the appeal of popular engineering majors, the ranking is expected to shift slightly backward from 55910; the predicted minimum ranking is about 56110, with a range of 55610–56610.

major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: For rankings within the predicted range of 55610–56610, it is recommended to take Tier 2 majors as the main application range, Tier 1 popular engineering majors as a sprint, and Tier 3 majors as a safety net; for rankings significantly better than the lower limit of the range (e.g., within 55000), focus on sprinting for Tier 1 flagship majors such as Electrical Engineering and Computer Science; for rankings close to the upper limit of the range (e.g., above 56500), it is recommended to mainly apply for Tier 3 majors, supplemented by Tier 2.
